children.heading: .—Basic Eligibility
children.label: a .—Basic Eligibility
children.text: The term “eligible person” as used in includes the children of those Commonwealth Army veterans and “New” Philippine Scouts who meet the requirements of service-connected disability or death, based on service as defined in .section 3501(a)(1) of this titlesection 3566 of this title

educational assistance allowances authorized by and the special training allowance authorized by shall be paid at the rate of $0.50 for each dollar, andsection 3532 of this titlesection 3542 of this title
any reference to a State approving agency shall be deemed to refer to the Secretary.

children.heading: .—Delimiting Dates
children.label: c .—Delimiting Dates
children.text: In the case of any individual who is an eligible person solely by virtue of subsection (a) of this section, and who is above the age of seventeen years and below the age of twenty-three years on , the period referred to in shall not end until the expiration of the five-year period which begins on .September 30, 1966September 30, 1966section 3512 of this title
